# accessflow_notification_channel (Resource)

A notification channel (Email, Slack, Webhook, Discord, Telegram, MS Teams, PagerDuty). Sensitive `config` values are write-only — the provider keeps the configured map rather than refreshing it.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "accessflow_notification_channel" "ops_slack" {
  name         = "ops-slack"
  channel_type = "SLACK"
  config = {
    webhook_url = var.slack_webhook_url
    channel_id  = "#ops"
  }
}

variable "slack_webhook_url" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_type` (String) `EMAIL`, `SLACK`, `WEBHOOK`, `DISCORD`, `TELEGRAM`, `MS_TEAMS`, or `PAGERDUTY`. Changing forces replacement.
- `config` (Map of String, Sensitive) Channel-type-specific settings as string values (e.g. `webhook_url`, `smtp_host`, `bot_token`).
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `organization_id` (String)
